name: BIG SKY INDUSTRIAL INC.
business: U.S. Energy Corp. is an industrial gas and energy company focused on the acquisition and development of industrial gases, oil and natural gas producing properties in the continental United States. Its principal properties are in the Rockies, Mid-Continent, and Gulf Coast regions. The company sells its oil and natural gas production to competing buyers, including large oil refining companies and independent marketers.

exposures.sentence: We are an industrial gas and energy company focused on the acquisition and development of industrial gases, oil and natural gas producing properties in the continental United States.
In June 2024, the Company acquired approximately 144,000 acres across the Kevin Dome in Toole County, Montana for the purposes of exploring and exploiting multiple, industrial gas streams.

Additionally, we drilled and completed two new industrial gas wells in 2025 and have filed monitoring, reporting and verifications applications with the government regulators that, assuming approved, will allow us to inject or dispose of carbon dioxide and waste gases, which is complementary to our ongoing development activities.

catalysts.event: Complete and test non-producing well in Toole County
catalysts.sentence: On January 7, 2025, we acquired an additional 24,000 net acres that are contiguous to our existing positions in Toole County including a non-producing well that is expected to be completed and tested in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Seek financing for gas processing plant construction (estimated $35 million)
catalysts.sentence: During 2026, the Company expects to seek financing in the equity and credit markets to fund the construction of its gas processing plant, production gathering and related utility infrastructure. The estimated cost of this next development phase is approximately $35.0 million.
